text:
Tingjun Zheng
Tingjun Zheng is an Assistant Professor of Practice in Business Analytics at NYU Shanghai and the Capstone Director of the MSDABC (Master of Science in Data Analytics and Business Computing) Program jointly offered by NYU Stern and NYU Shanghai.
Prior to joining NYU Shanghai, he was an adjunct professor at Xi’an Jiaotong Liverpool University and an external professor at SKEMA Business School in China. His academic and teaching interests focus on big data, data mining, machine learning, AI applications in business, and the intersection of business and information technology. Starting his career with the Global Decision Sciences Lab at GE Capital, Tingjun has over 20 years of extensive industry experience leading business analytics, investment analysis, and consulting with international clients.
